commit_scope: Remove Python runtime fallback from Form-kernel served utility routes

commands: python3 -m py_compile api/app/services/form_kernel_bridge.py api/app/routers/kernel_shared.py api/app/routers/kernel_nodeid.py api/app/routers/kernel_scoring.py api/app/routers/kernel_breath.py api/app/routers/kernel_grounding.py api/app/routers/kernel_grounded_cv.py api/app/routers/kernel_matching.py api/app/services/vitality_service.py api/tests/test_form_kernel_bridge_structure_access.py api/tests/test_kernel_inline_latency.py scripts/runtime_surface_report.py
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_utils_*.py tests/test_kernel_inline_latency.py tests/test_form_kernel_bridge_structure_access.py tests/test_api_dockerfile_contract.py

! rg -n "fallback=|run_with_fallback|python-fallback|fallback" api/app/services/form_kernel_bridge.py api/app/routers/kernel_*.py api/app/routers/utils.py api/app/services/vitality_service.py api/tests/test_utils_*.py api/tests/test_kernel_inline_latency.py api/tests/test_form_kernel_bridge_structure_access.py api/tests/test_api_dockerfile_contract.py scripts/runtime_surface_report.py -g '!docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_*.json'

git diff --check -- api/app/services/form_kernel_bridge.py api/app/services/vitality_service.py api/app/routers/kernel_shared.py api/app/routers/kernel_nodeid.py api/app/routers/kernel_scoring.py api/app/routers/kernel_breath.py api/app/routers/kernel_grounding.py api/app/routers/kernel_grounded_cv.py api/app/routers/kernel_matching.py api/app/routers/utils.py api/tests/test_utils_coherence_weight.py api/tests/test_utils_nodeid_distance.py api/tests/test_utils_nodeid_compatibility.py api/tests/test_utils_weighted_average.py api/tests/test_utils_breath_balance.py api/tests/test_utils_shannon_entropy.py api/tests/test_utils_softmax_weights.py api/tests/test_utils_concept_match_score.py api/tests/test_utils_cost_value_vector.py api/tests/test_utils_grounded_cost.py api/tests/test_utils_grounded_value.py api/tests/test_utils_idea_grounded_cost_sum.py api/tests/test_utils_idea_grounding_summary.py api/tests/test_utils_idea_marginal_from_record.py api/tests/test_kernel_inline_latency.py api/tests/test_form_kernel_bridge_structure_access.py api/tests/test_api_dockerfile_contract.py scripts/runtime_surface_report.py docs/system_audit/commit_evidence_2026-06-06_kernel_routes_remove_python_fallback.json
local_validation.summary: serve_via_kernel no longer accepts a fallback callable and no longer returns python-fallback. Missing recipe artifacts or missing kernel carriers now fail loudly. All Form-kernel utility route handlers call the kernel-only bridge. The focused utility/kernel suite passed: 118 passed, 3 skipped, 5 warnings. Kernel readiness smoke for nodeid_distance matched cpython=7 and kernel=7. Runtime-surface report still sees 22 kernel-served routes and 23 kernel-first capable routes, with _py functions counted as parity references rather than request-time fallbacks.

ci_validation.reason: No commit or PR created in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: No production deploy performed. The final wellness reading could not reach https://api.coherencycoin.com/api/health and therefore sensed the kernel surface locally only.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed, but CI and production deploy validation have not run for this uncommitted worktree.

evidence_refs: api/app/services/form_kernel_bridge.py exposes run_kernel and serve_via_kernel without any fallback callable or python-fallback runtime branch.
All app.routers.kernel_* serve_via_kernel call sites no longer pass fallback lambdas.
GET /api/utils/kernel_status now reports inline, subprocess, or unavailable; served route response models document only inline/subprocess as kernel carriers.
Focused utility/kernel tests passed with served-route runtime assertions narrowed to inline/subprocess.
The no-fallback scan returned no matches across the edited bridge, kernel routes, utility tests, Dockerfile contract, and runtime report surfaces.
Wellness local kernel-native API reading reported 22/22 recipes trace within envelope and 22/22 value parity; production health was unreachable during this run.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form-kernel utility routes no longer have a Python runtime alternate path. If a recipe artifact or kernel carrier is missing, the route fails instead of computing through Python.
test_flows: Focused utility endpoints served through inline/subprocess only in local ASGI tests.
Bridge structure-access tests call serve_via_kernel without fallback callables.
Dockerfile contract still verifies endpoint recipes are tracked and copied so missing artifacts fail before deploy.
Runtime-surface report parses after renaming fallback functions to parity references.
